title: Active learning of collinear magnetic Moment Tensor Potentials using the spin-MLIP package from soft-constrained spin-polarized DFT calculations: a case study of Fe-Pd
title_zh: 用 spin-MLIP 主动学习 Fe-Pd 磁势
summary: Fe-Pd 磁性 MTP 可由软约束自旋 DFT 主动学习构建。

title: Piezoelectric Energy Harvesting Coupled with Energy-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Extended-Endurance Autonomous UAVs
title_zh: 压电采能与节能深度强化学习无人机
summary: PZT-5A 机臂采能与节能导航被联合用于延长无人机续航。

title: Microstructure-Aware Deep Learning Bridges Atomistics to Macroscale for Shock-to-Detonation Prediction
title_zh: 微结构感知深度学习预测冲击起爆
summary: 微结构深度模型绕开尺度分离假设预测冲击起爆。

title: Unlocking 3D nanoparticle shapes from 2D high-resolution transmission electron microscopy images: a deep learning approach
title_zh: 由二维高分辨电镜解锁三维纳米形貌
summary: 深度学习把二维高分辨电镜图像转化为三维纳米颗粒形貌。

title: SQARL: A Size-Agnostic Reinforcement Learning approach for Circuit Allocation in Distributed Quantum Architectures
title_zh: 分布式量子架构的尺寸无关强化学习
summary: SQARL 将量子电路分配策略泛化到不同规模分布式架构。

title: Autonomous materials discovery through a tabula rasa active learning framework
title_zh: 白板主动学习自主发现材料
summary: 白板主动学习用于高维多元合金电催化剂搜索。

title: Minimal surfaces, Knots, and Neural Networks
title_zh: 极小曲面、纽结与神经网络
summary: 神经网络被用于探索纽结多项式与双曲极小曲面的联系。

title: A PAC-Bayesian View of Generalisation for Physics-Informed Machine Learning
title_zh: 物理知情机器学习泛化的 PAC-贝叶斯视角
summary: PAC-贝叶斯框架给出物理知情模型泛化分析。
